summary: Pre-deployment E2E test completed successfully. CRITICAL FIX APPLIED: Metro cache cleared to fix frontend backend URL mismatch (was using old 'perix-city' URL instead of 'media-platform-test-2'). All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend login, navigation, and all critical flows verified.

user_login.notes: Login with email/password works after cache clear. Backend returns 200 OK.

home_feed.notes: Shows Events, Businesses, Artists, Stories sections correctly

messages.notes: Messages page loads with New Message form, Recent chats section, and call icon visible

call_history.notes: Call History page loads, API returns 200 OK. Clear All button present when calls exist.

subscription_paypal.notes: Subscription page shows business selection, Monthly ($9.99) and Yearly ($99) plans with Save 20% badge, features list, and Subscribe Now button

profile.notes: Profile page loads with user info, Personal Information, Post as User/Business toggle, Friends, Business sections

navigation.notes: All tabs (Home, Search, Activities, Messages, Profile) navigate correctly

back_navigation.notes: Browser back button works correctly, safeGoBack hook verified in code

critical_fix_applied.issue: Frontend was calling wrong backend URL (perix-city.preview.emergentagent.com instead of media-platform-test-2.preview.emergentagent.com)
critical_fix_applied.root_cause: Metro cache contained old bundled URL from app.json.extra
critical_fix_applied.fix: Cleared metro cache: rm -rf /app/frontend/.metro-cache && sudo supervisorctl restart expo

critical_code_review_comments: useSafeNavigation hook properly implemented with fallback routes
Call history Clear All feature working (DELETE /api/calls/history returns 200)
PayPal subscription integration returning valid plan IDs and pricing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All E2E flows verified. Metro cache was cleared to fix URL mismatch - this should persist unless app.json is changed. Call history and subscription features fully functional. PayPal integration returns valid plan IDs ($9.99 monthly, $99 yearly).

deployment_readiness.backend: READY - All APIs returning expected responses
deployment_readiness.frontend: READY - All user flows working after cache fix
